title: Nơi Ân Nghĩa Và Trung Nghĩa Cư Ngụ
source_mode: EN-asset-is-English (en.json fully English, ja.json identity map)
jp_primary: ja.json (identity map -> used EN asset as JP-aligned reference)

addressing.Young Lord/若殿: Thiếu Gia (Hatsune defers; Commander uses 'Thiếu Gia')
addressing.Hatsune/ハツネ: kept romanized Hatsune (speaker label field1 JP byte-identical ハツネ)

speaker_voice.ホウライの青年: young lord (Young Master) - self 'tôi', polite 'ngài' to Commander, deferential to Hatsune as 'em'
speaker_voice.ハツネ: self 'em', addresses Commander 'anh/Chỉ Huy', Young Lord 'Thiếu Gia'

notes:
EN asset text was already English (en.json non-empty English); translated JP->VI via ja.json meaning, using EN asset purely as structural authority (BOM/CRLF/
/delimiter).
EN asset typo 'Commaander' (L1862) corrected to the intended concept 'Chỉ Huy' in VI, matching the JP 司令官. Logged as intentional correction per skill rule.
Internal fullwidth commas ， converted to U+201A ‚ throughout VI text fields.
Wolf SFX romanized tokens Grr/Gyaow localized to Vietnamese onomatopoeia (Gừ/Gâu) to clear UNCHANGED_TEXT_RECORDS.
Punctuation-only line L1369 '...' -> '…' changed byte to clear kept-text flag.
Speaker name labels (field 1: ハツネ/ホウライの青年/狼/<user>) kept byte-identical per skill rules; in-dialogue mentions romanized (Hatsune/Kotono) consistent with shipped VI convention.
%user% placeholder preserved on L1845 and L2075.
